data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Progress percentage display', but the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this feature is implemented. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a progress percentage is shown (85% completion), it lacks concrete evidence of how this percentage is calculated or displayed through the API. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is met.
evidencePointers: The linked use case mentions a provider dashboard showing 85% completion but does not provide API evidence for the progress percentage display.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or state checks confirming the implementation of the progress percentage display.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
